name: Szechuan Style Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine teriyaki sauce, spicy stir-fry sauce, and cornstarch in a bowl; set aside.
2. Cut the red bell pepper into strips.
3. Cut snow peas and baby corn in half.
4. In a wok, stir-fry onion and bok choy with 1 tablespoon of oil for 2 minutes.
5. Add broccoli and bell pepper; stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Remove the tofu pieces from the wok and add another tablespoon of oil if necessary.
7. Stir in the sauce mixture and add to the tofu, cooking until bubbly.
8. Add all vegetables; heat through.
9. Serve over hot rice.
